title: DisplayMessage construction boilerplate duplicated ~30 times across tui/app.rs (DRY)
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: DRY
Location: src/tui/app.rs — every slash-command arm and every event handler builds: DisplayMessage { role: system.to_string(), content: ..., tool_name: None, is_error: false, is_thinking: false }. Counted 30+ occurrences.
Violation: Every branch repeats the same five-field literal, differing only in role/content/is_error. Any future field addition to DisplayMessage requires touching 30 sites. Archetype DRY violation.
Mandated Refactor: After finding #275 (MessageKind enum) lands, add constructors: impl DisplayMessage { pub fn info(text: impl Into<String>), pub fn error(text), pub fn user(text), pub fn assistant(text), pub fn tool_ok(name, content), pub fn tool_err(name, content), pub fn thinking(text) }. Collapses 7-line blocks into 1-liner: self.messages.add(DisplayMessage::error(format!(Failed: {e}))). Reduces tui/app.rs by ~400 lines.
